title: Settings
description: Manage your account, learning preferences, and app experience.

emailPrefs.title: Email preferences
emailPrefs.hint: Transactional emails (password reset, invitations) are always sent.

learning.title: Learning profile
learning.hint: Used to tailor lesson depth, examples, and AI tutoring.
learning.missing: Education level and country are required.

appearance.title: Appearance & language
appearance.hint: Choose how Adesia looks and which language the interface uses.

help.title: Help & onboarding
help.hint: Replay the guided tour to learn how Self-learn, Practice, and subscriptions work.
